title: ICML 2026 Position Paper accepted
summary: Our position paper — Breaking the Dual Curse of Multilingual AI — argues that multilingual safety cannot be retrofitted through post-hoc alignment.

title: DIA-HARM wins ACL 2026 Social Impact Paper Award 🏆
summary: Recognized at the 64th ACL for advancing equity in harmful-content detection across 50 English dialects.

title: SEAL Lab launches at CU Boulder
summary: The Secure and Ethical AI Lab formally begins operations. Recruiting PhD students, postdocs, and undergrad researchers.
